attributes.action:
No involvement in USA Israel war on Iran.
We do not consent! Withdraw now!
attributes.additional_details:
The UK USA And Israel already have blood on their hands. We the people do not consent to yet more blood shed and we must reserve our armed forces for defending the British Isles. 

We have had enough of war and destruction.
attributes.background: Kepp out of this war. Withdraw any support and intelligence. We must not be even more complicit in a war taht involved a state that committed genocide. No more wars.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Withdraw involvement in war on Iran and seek diplomatic resolution" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/761718
